title: Request Unit 01s Face
wikitext:
[]: Request: Unit 01's Face             Quote Post by evilhead008 » Sun May 15, 2011 4:41 pm Hey, I haven't been here for quite awhile, but I recently picked up Rebuild 1.11 and 2.xx (forgot exactly which one it's on.) As usual, I quickly slipped into one of those "I don't understand it, time to look it up on Wikipedia" moods, although it was nowhere near as long/bad as it was after watching EoE. So, basically, while browsing Unit-01's entry on the wiki: "... Absent are the scenes where she shields Shinji from the falling lights and where Shinji sees her exposed face. However, a more direct intimation of Yui's presence in the Eva is provided much earlier, and Eva-01's face is still revealed in an easily-missed shot where she is being outfitted with the G-Type Sniping Equipment." So I thought, "Woah, I want to see that!" But rebooting up 1.11 hasn't given me any answers; I assume I'm just too dumb to find the scene. Does anybody know where it is/could provide a screenshot? I've been looking around the Operation Yashima scene, but I don't think it's there...

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 15, 2011 7:45 pm The quote you cited is referring to what's absent in Evangelion 1.11. If you'd like to see that face, refer yourself to NGE episode 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun May 15, 2011 8:11 pm Sachi wrote: The quote you cited is referring to what's absent in Evangelion 1.11. If you'd like to see that face, refer yourself to NGE episode 02.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun May 15, 2011 8:18 pm Azathoth wrote: Reading comprehension?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 15, 2011 11:28 pm WOW, I hadn't noticed that one. Teh EYES!

[]:             Quote Post by fadadio » Mon May 16, 2011 2:43 am thats not her face, it's the face of the Eva which is a clone of Adam, it's her soul that lies within it

[]:             Quote Post by LoCooLaidman » Mon May 16, 2011 11:27 am ^ Her soul is in the body... thus it's "her" body... err face. Just leave it at that.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Mon May 16, 2011 5:16 pm That's a bit sinister... possibly more than in the serie. Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 16, 2011 7:48 pm Viking wrote: That's a bit sinister... possibly more than in the serie. Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon May 16, 2011 8:34 pm Kendrix wrote: Yep. Also, this time, no skin for us.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Mon May 16, 2011 8:49 pm Azathoth wrote: Does Unit 01 wear a huge suit of bandages all the time? In fact, why was she all bandaged in episode 20, it's not like there was any significant injury to her head any more than there was here. If anything, I'd expect not bandages but a full undersuit thing like Mark 06 has.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 17, 2011 7:08 am I think the lack of displayed face is just meant to make stuff more mysterious, just like we're never shown the "face" of any SoL in their natural state. Also, there are probably not really bandages - see those holes? They're probably related to how you attach the mask.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue May 17, 2011 9:52 am Those aren't holes, they're markings. http://i580.photobucket.com/albums/ss250/Shrooom/eva01bandage.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by juaxoo » Tue May 17, 2011 10:32 am Rodeo wrote: Those aren't holes, they're markings. http://i580.photobucket.com/albums/ss250/Shrooom/eva01bandage.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by fadadio » Wed May 18, 2011 12:01 am LoCooLaidman wrote: ^ Her soul is in the body... thus it's "her" body... err face. Just leave it at that.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed May 18, 2011 12:12 am fadadio wrote: that is akin to saying that if a parasite was within my body controlling my movements only in extreme circumstances and claiming my face was it's own. it's not her face it's the face of the beast within the eva. the only way it would be her facial expression is if she was in direct control(berserk) at the time of the fitting on the equipment. So unless she was trolling everyone with that bug eyed face then its just the way the Eva looks when its not under any direct control from either Yui,Shinji or the dummy plug.

[]:             Quote Post by fadadio » Wed May 18, 2011 1:41 am Sachi wrote: It's actually more akin to saying that a once empty, soulless doll now occupied by a soul now belongs to the soul. You're fallacious in suggesting that Yui's soul isn't always participating just because she's not always Berserk/taking full control of her body, and further so in suggesting that the Eva cannot be bug eyed if controlled by a soul. If I were to, for whatever reason, suddenly have a face like Karl Ruprecht Kroenen , and my eyes are always popping out, does that mean my soul is no longer active in my body (assuming, simply for the sake of argument, that the soul exists)? EDIT: in other words, as a summation of my point, Yui is the beast within the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 18, 2011 1:48 am We've actually have a thread (which itself was a tangent) about this tangent. Continue on over here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3443

[]:             Quote Post by fadadio » Wed May 18, 2011 2:09 am Ornette wrote: We've actually have a thread (which itself was a tangent) about this tangent. Continue on over here: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3443

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 18, 2011 2:25 am fadadio wrote: judgeing from the start of the topic it was someone who denies that Yui can control the Eva or was in control during the Zeruel fight in the original series. What im trying to say is that the Eva is not her body. Sure she may control it from time to time but Im saying it in the litteral sense that Eva unit 1's DNA is that of Adam and NOT Yui. so its not her body it's the body of Cloned Adam that she has control of from time to time
